Game.Name: Incantation (USA)
Game.plot: Story:Incantation is a game with an incredibly simple story: Play as a young boy wizard to defeat some evil. Gameplay:The game is an action side-scroller set in a medieval fantasy world. The boy wizard you play as carries a large wand that has different projectiles based upon what power-ups you've picked up. The goal of each level is to find three golden feathers to then pass a gate and fight a boss, thus ending the level. Cheat: Cheat menuAt the title screen, press shoulder buttons R, L, L, R, R, R, L, L, L, L, up, down, up, down. The screen blinks. Start the game, and during gameplay press X to bring up the cheat menu.
